location: Sold by Gatekeeper Gostoc, who sets up shop in the gatehouse room beside Stormveil Castle's main entrance — but only after Godrick the Grafted has been defeated. Price is 1,500 Runes. It is also the starting shield for the Bandit class.
tactics: Gostoc initially only talks to you near the main gate and won't sell anything — you must beat Godrick the Grafted at the top of the castle before he reappears in the gatehouse as a merchant.
If you killed Gostoc earlier instead of sparing him, his Bell Bearing can be handed to the Twin Maidens at Roundtable Hold to unlock the same wares there.
The Buckler comes with its own innate Buckler Parry skill (0 FP), which recovers slightly faster than the standard dagger Parry — useful if you're building around parries.
lore: A small metal roundshield with a raised boss at its center built specifically for parrying — a well-timed block with it staggers an attacker and opens them up for a critical riposte.

builds.name: Dexterity parry build
builds.why: Its scaling leans heavily Dexterity over Strength, and its built-in fast parry skill makes it the go-to shield for players who want to parry without relying on a dagger.
